subject: [DCAEGEN2] Updates to bootstrap and cm-container
commit_message:
[DCAEGEN2] Updates to bootstrap and cm-container

Update cm-container to 4.1.0
Update bootstrap to 3.0.0
Move plugin configuration from bootstrap to cm-container
Remove unneeded inputs files

Issue-ID: DCAEGEN2-2542
Issue-ID: DCAEGEN2-2582
Issue-ID: DCAEGEN2-2543
Issue-ID: DCAEGEN2-2383
Signed-off-by: Jack Lucas <jflos@sonoris.net>
Change-Id: I30a3f549d9811adedc8472fd410038eaa068e771

> (2 comments)

> is it OK to remove CMPv2 stuff?

But let's wait for the answer from Jack ;)

Patch Set 3:

> Patch Set 3:
> 
> > Patch Set 3: Code-Review-1
> > 
> > (2 comments)
> > 
> > is it OK to remove CMPv2 stuff?
> 
> It seems that CMPv2 configuration has been move (as per commit message) to this file:  kubernetes/dcaegen2/components/dcae-cloudify-manager/requirements.yaml 
> 
> But let's wait for the answer from Jack ;)

It has been moved.  Previously, the bootstrap container was responsible for loading the plugin configurations, including the CMPv2 configuration.  Now it's done by an init container in the dcae-cloudify-manager chart.
